## s3lim

s3lim is a high-performance S3 inventory analysis tool

### Synopsis

s3lim is a high-performance S3 inventory analysis tool designed to
analyze massive S3 inventory files (CSV, Parquet) efficiently. It supports both
local and remote inventory files.

```
s3lim [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help               help for s3lim
      --log-level string   Log level (debug, info, warn, error) (default "info")
```

### SEE ALSO

* [s3lim analyze](s3lim_analyze.md)	 - Analyze an S3 inventory file or manifest.json
